notFoundDescription: The requested vendor could not be found.

coBidding.title: Co-Bidding Pattern Detected
coBidding.description: This vendor frequently appears in the same procedures with specific partners.
coBidding.noPatternsDescription: Requires ≥3 shared competitive procedures with another vendor
coBidding.heuristicNote: This is a separate heuristic analysis. The v0.6.5 ML risk score assigns co_bid_rate a coefficient of 0.000 — co-bidding patterns did not discriminate corrupt from clean vendors in the training data and do not contribute to the displayed risk score.

flags.highDirectAward: {{pct}}% of contracts were direct awards (bypassed competitive tendering)
flags.highSingleBid: {{pct}}% of competitive procedures had only this vendor bidding
flags.suspiciousCoBidding: Notable co-bidding patterns detected (heuristic analysis — not included in the v0.6.5 ML risk score, which assigns co_bid_rate a coefficient of 0.000)
flags.highClustering: High network clustering ({{pct}}%) — bidding partners form a tightly-knit group
flags.primaryDriver: Primary driver: {{factor}} (z={{z}} — {{z}} SDs above sector average)
flags.disclaimer: Flags are statistical risk indicators, not proof of wrongdoing. Use for investigation triage only.

groundTruth.headline: Documented in a known corruption case
groundTruth.detail: This vendor appears in {{n}} ground-truth case(s) used to train the v0.6.5 risk model.

efosDefinitivo.headline: SAT-confirmed ghost company (EFOS Definitivo)
efosDefinitivo.detail: The Mexican tax authority has definitively listed this RFC under Art. 69-B as a ghost company issuing simulated invoices.

efosPresunto.headline: Alleged ghost company (EFOS Presunto)
efosPresunto.detail: Listed by SAT as an alleged ghost company and currently under investigation.

sfp.headline: {{n}} SFP sanction record(s) on file
sfp.detail: Sanctioned by the Secretaría de la Función Pública.

riskCritical.headline: Critical risk score ({{pct}}/100) — strongest similarity to documented corruption patterns

riskHigh.headline: High risk score ({{pct}}/100) — strong similarity to documented corruption patterns

highClustering.headline: High network clustering ({{pct}}%) — bidding partners form a tightly-knit group

fpStructural.headline: Structural monopoly — risk score is not an anomaly
fpStructural.detail: This vendor is a sole-source supplier in a regulated market (e.g. medical gases, specialty pharma). High direct-award and concentration scores are expected and do not indicate malfeasance.

institutionalCapture.headline: {{pct}}% of awards from a single institution ({{inst}})
institutionalCapture.detail: Concentration of contracts from one buyer may indicate regulatory capture (P6 pattern). Verify whether procurement was competitive across the period.

waterfall.description: Positive bars increase risk (red/orange). Negative bars reduce risk (green). Bar height reflects each factor's contribution to the overall score.

yearEnd.title: Year-End Concentration
yearEnd.description: December contracts bypass normal review cycles — a timing anomaly associated with budget dumping.

aria.notInQueue: This vendor is not in the ARIA investigation queue.
aria.notInQueueNote: Only vendors with a significant IPS score appear here.

vendorGroupTooltip: This vendor belongs to a related network group
